overview: Dimir Faeries is a Pauper U/B tempo deck that leverages small flying creatures and instant-speed interaction to control the board while steadily draining the opponent's life total. By combining Spellstutter Sprite's life loss triggers with Snuff Out's conditional counters, the deck applies constant pressure and disrupts key threats. Lorien Revealed serves as a board-clearing finisher that stabilizes the game state and provides crucial life gain.
win_conditions: Gradually reduce opponent life total through repeated Spellstutter Sprite triggers
Control the board with Snuff Out and -1/-1 counters to outlast aggressive strategies
Close out games with flying creatures and card advantage after Lorien Revealed clears the board

keep_criteria: Hands containing Snuff Out or early Spellstutter Sprite
Balanced curves with at least two sources of interaction or flying creatures
Lorien Revealed paired with early counters or removal
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking any instant-speed interaction or early plays
Overloaded with late-game sorceries like Lorien Revealed without early defense
No flying creatures or life loss triggers to apply pressure

early_game: Deploy Spellstutter Sprite immediately to start triggering life loss on opponent spells
Use Snuff Out to counter high-impact creature spells or early threats
Establish a flying presence to pressure the opponent while maintaining board control
mid_game: Time Lorien Revealed to clear multiple opponent creatures and gain substantial life
Continue applying -1/-1 counters to shrink threats and enable favorable trades
Maintain hand of instant-speed interaction to disrupt opponent's key turns
late_game: Leverage accumulated life advantage and card draw to outvalue the opponent
Use remaining counters and removal to protect your flying finishers
Close the game by repeatedly triggering Sprite on opponent's recovery spells

key_cards.name: Spellstutter Sprite
key_cards.role: Primary life loss engine and board presence
key_cards.notes: Play early to maximize triggers; target opponent's largest creatures with -1/-1 counters to shrink threats while draining life

key_cards.name: Snuff Out
key_cards.notes: Prioritize countering creature spells to trigger the -1/-1 counter clause; use to protect your board or set up favorable trades

key_cards.name: Lorien Revealed
key_cards.role: Board clear and life gain stabilizer
key_cards.notes: Cast when opponent has multiple creatures to maximize board wipe effect and life gain; use to reset unfavorable board states

sequencing_tips: Hold Snuff Out until the opponent commits to a high-value spell to maximize the -1/-1 counter trigger
Trigger Spellstutter Sprite on opponent's spells rather than your own to avoid self-inflicted counters
Cast Lorien Revealed after the opponent has played multiple creatures to maximize life gain and board impact

matchups.advice: Prioritize countering early threats with Snuff Out and use Sprite to drain life while trading efficiently
Apply consistent flying pressure and life loss to force them to use removal inefficiently
Disrupt their key value creatures with Snuff Out and use Lorien Revealed to reset their board development

common_threats: Fast aggressive creatures that bypass flying
Uncounterable spells or creatures with hexproof
Board wipes that remove counters and clear your board
